intro: 5 easy problems that drill the Sorted List pattern — ideal for focused practice sessions.

faqs.question: Why practice easy Sorted List problems?
faqs.answer: Difficulty-scoped drills lock the pattern before you mix constraints on harder variants.

seo.title: Easy Sorted List Problems | AlgoForge
